visual_description: A man in a light-colored shirt and tie is shown in profile, looking downward with his head slightly tilted. In a wider shot, two men in similar attire stand near a computer monitor in a dimly lit, industrial-looking room with overhead lighting. One man stands facing forward with a neutral posture, while the other is partially visible behind him, both appearing stationary.
audio_description: The audio clip begins in a large, reverberant indoor space, likely a hall or auditorium, with a persistent low-frequency hum and faint high-frequency hiss forming the ambient background. The acoustics are characterized by pronounced echo and a long decay, suggesting a hard-surfaced, empty environment. A single male voice, speaking in standard Mandarin Chinese, enters with a measured, formal tone. He delivers the phrase, “我会给大家一个交代” (“I will give everyone an explanation”), his speech clear and deliberate, with a slight downward inflection at the end. The reverberation is pronounced, and the voice is centered in the stereo field, indicating the speaker is positioned at a distance from the microphone. After a brief pause, the same speaker, now closer to the microphone and with a more subdued, apologetic tone, says, “对不起” (“I’m sorry”). This second phrase is quieter, with a softer, breathy quality and a noticeable drop in volume. The reverberation is less pronounced here, and the voice remains centered.
